examples: Several of them keeled over in the heat.
He then keeled over and fell flat on his back.
The boat pitched suddenly and keeled over.
Industry observers couldn't recall an incident involving a cruise ship in recent history with images as searing as the keeled-over Costa Concordia.
Newt Gingrich showed that he is equally comfortable debating his Republican opponents as both a fiery underdog and an even keeled front runner.
